services.description: (Lips not included) Areas included in Face Enhancement: Cheeks, Jawline, Chin, Temples, Nasolabial folds, Smoker’s lines, Marionette lines, Pre-jowl sulcus, Neck lines.
Your current lips must have no migration/lumps.

treatments.description: This treatment uses your own plasma which is injected into the area being treated, with microneedling also performed to enhance skin rejuvenation. (Includes taking your blood).
